name: @glimmer/component-gxt
description: RFC §6 Option-2 fallback: a GXT-backed sibling of @glimmer/component. Re-exports the @glimmer/component public API and binds its reactive core (createTag / CURRENT_TAG / @tracked) to the GXT shims so symbol identity does NOT fork against an npm-installed @glimmer/component. Workspace-private build-time machinery; not published yet (see RFC §5.5 / §6 — depends on the unshipped ember-source-gxt packaging).
comment-on-gxt-backend: The reactive core this package binds to (`@ember/-internals/gxt-backend/*`, see src/reactive.ts) is provided by the GXT rollup alias map (rollup.config.mjs), NOT by npm resolution. It is therefore intentionally NOT declared as a dependency here — `@ember/-internals/gxt-backend` is not a pnpm workspace package. When the real `ember-source-gxt` packaging exists (RFC §5.5), these specifiers resolve through that package.
